title: Idle Words
content:
They say that every idle word
    Is numbered by the Omniscient Lord.
    O Parliament! 'tis well that He
    Endureth for Eternity,
    And that a thousand Angels wait
    To write them at thy inner gate.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Walter Savage Landor, titled "Idle Words", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
